title: tribulus arvensis
intro: Tribulus arvensis, also known as puncture vine or devil's thorn, is a type of flowering plant in the family Zygophyllaceae, characterized by its sharp, thorn-like projections and small, yellowish flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Tribulus arvensis include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced male fertility, and support for urinary tract health. Tribulus arvensis is commonly prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, as well as in teas and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
